privileged_info_summary: The task setup script in /home/ga/legacy-app builds a synthetic Flask HR dashboard backed by an in-memory SQLite table of three employees and writes synthetic traffic/attack URLs for verification, so the data is generated locally rather than sourced from an external dataset.
